summary: Phase 2 backend + frontend testing of UGS HireFlow. Wrote new pytest suite /app/backend/tests/test_phase2.py — 39/39 tests PASS covering: partners CRUD (idempotent-by-phone, cannot-delete-with-linked-candidates), multipart register-candidate-full with photo+resume+multiple certificates+experience_documents, verify-v2 (new_partner creates+links, idempotent on same phone, existing partner_id path), candidate filters (partner_id, reference_name search, include_archived), full lifecycle (archive/restore/soft-delete/permanent-delete with correct list visibility), duplicate check & merge, employee detail with workload/stage_counts/assigned/activity/login_history & RBAC (employee cannot fetch other employees), company hiring history stats, job workspace + close/reopen/bulk-allocate/remove-candidate, batch mark-running/mark-completed, org settings GET/PUT, saved filters CRUD, Excel .xlsx preview+import (skip_duplicates) + export (bytes valid), extended /search/full returning 6 keys, profile completion recompute, quick view, notifications triggered on registration, error handlers (JSON on 404, 422 on validation). Phase 1 suite still 34/34 PASS (regression clean). Frontend UI verified: admin login, sidebar shows Partners+Employees+all Phase 2 sections, Partners page renders 4 partner cards with UGS-P codes and candidate counts, Candidates list has all expected data-testids (search/partner-filter/employee-filter/open-import/export-xlsx/save-filter/toggle-archived), Candidate detail shows Profile completion progress bar, LINKED RECORDS section, Verify/Archive/Delete/Merge buttons, all 6 tabs (Overview/Pipeline/Documents/Payments/Partner/Activity). Employee detail shows workload stats, assigned candidates list, stage breakdown. Company detail loads with HR/Jobs. Job workspace, Batch detail load. Settings has Organization section with Brand. Global search 'priya' returns matches. End-to-end public 4-step Register wizard fully works — submitted candidate persists in admin list with correct reference_name/reference_phone; success toast shown; zero console errors.

minor.issue: FIXED — Endpoint was returning 422 'Input should be a valid list' for certificates/experience_documents/supporting_documents due to FastAPI signature `Optional[List[UploadFile]] = File(None)` which mishandles multipart lists. Changed to `List[UploadFile] = File(default_factory=list)`. Verified with curl (200) and playwright end-to-end registration flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Console hydration warning: 'In HTML, <a> cannot be a descendant of <a>'. Nested anchor tag inside another anchor in DashboardLayout (likely brand link wrapping another link).
Existing Phase 1 warning still present: Recharts logs width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial mount. Cosmetic.

action_items: Fix nested <a> hydration warning in DashboardLayout (avoid wrapping a Link inside another anchor).
Fix Recharts container sizing warnings on Admin Dashboard (wrap ResponsiveContainer in fixed-height parent) — carryover from iteration 1.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_v2.py: FIXED — `Optional[List[UploadFile]] = File(None)` is a known FastAPI footgun that fails multipart list validation. Changed to `List[UploadFile] = File(default_factory=list)`. This blocked the primary Phase 2 registration flow before the fix.
server.py + routes_v2.py combined are large; consider splitting Phase 2 routes into topical sub-routers (partners, candidates_admin, org, filters, xlsx, search) for maintainability.
`/api/candidates` returns paginated `{items,total}` dict while some sub-endpoints (e.g. /partners, /activity-logs) return bare lists — consider unifying the pagination envelope across list endpoints.
Notifications endpoint returns `{items, unread}` — good, but frontend contract with backend list shapes varies (dict-with-items vs bare list); document contract clearly.
seed_data_creation: Tests seed their own TEST_-prefixed candidates/partners/filters. Phase 1 startup seed remains untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two backend pytest suites now: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (Phase 1 – 34 tests) and /app/backend/tests/test_phase2.py (Phase 2 – 39 tests). Run each with `-o addopts='' -p no:xdist` to disable pytest-xdist parallel mode (session-scoped fixtures don't cooperate well with loadscope in this env). Key note: `/api/candidates` returns `{items,total}` (paginated), while `/api/partners`, `/api/activity-logs` return bare lists. `/api/notifications` returns `{items, unread}`. Job reopen-job / batch mark-completed data-testids are conditional (only render when job.status=='closed' / batch.status=='running'). Partners UI does not use `partner-card` testid pattern — page has `partners-page` testid at root and cards render inline; add per-card testids if needed for finer testing.
rca_of_the_issue: register-candidate-full 422: FastAPI's `Optional[List[UploadFile]] = File(None)` incorrectly binds a single (or even multi-file) multipart field because the parameter default `None` conflicts with list-typing. The correct pattern is either `List[UploadFile] = File(default_factory=list)` (accept 0+ files) or `List[UploadFile] = File(...)` (require at least one). Fix applied to certificates, experience_documents, supporting_documents. Also confirmed via curl before-and-after (422 → 200).
